revision.text: [[Special:Preferences|{{int:mypreferences}}]]{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}} |0 |user profile= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-personal|{{int:prefs-personal}}]] |1 |appearance= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|{{int:prefs-rendering}}]] |2 |date and time= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-datetime|Date and time]] |3 |editing= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-editing|{{int:prefs-editing}}]] |4 |recent changes= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rc|{{int:prefs-rc}}]] |5 |watchlist= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-watchlist|{{int:prefs-watchlist}}]] |6 |search= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-searchoptions|{{int:prefs-searchoptions}}]] |8 |pending changes= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-flaggedrevs|Pending changes]] |9 |gadgets= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-gadgets|{{int:prefs-gadgets}}]] |10 |notifications= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-echo|{{int:prefs-echo}}]] |11 |beta|beta features= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|{{int:prefs-betafeatures}}]] |7 |12 |misc= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-misc|Misc]] |banners= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-centralnotice-banners|{{int:prefs-centralnotice-banners}}]] }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| → {{Preferences/section|{{{1}}}|{{{2}}}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| = {{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{uncheck|}}}| → {{nowrap|{{MediaWiki checkbox|no}} {{wrap|{{{uncheck}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{check|}}}| → {{nowrap|{{MediaWiki checkbox}} {{wrap|{{{check}}}}}}}|}}}}}} {{documentation}}

[[Special:Preferences|{{int:mypreferences}}]]{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}} |0 |user profile= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-personal|{{int:prefs-personal}}]] |1 |appearance= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|{{int:prefs-rendering}}]] |2 |date and time= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-datetime|Date and time]] |3 |editing= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-editing|{{int:prefs-editing}}]] |4 |recent changes= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rc|{{int:prefs-rc}}]] |5 |watchlist= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-watchlist|{{int:prefs-watchlist}}]] |6 |search= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-searchoptions|{{int:prefs-searchoptions}}]] |8 |pending changes= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-flaggedrevs|Pending changes]] |9 |gadgets= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-gadgets|{{int:prefs-gadgets}}]] |10 |notifications= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-echo|{{int:prefs-echo}}]] |11 |beta|beta features= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|{{int:prefs-betafeatures}}]] |7 |12 |misc= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-misc|Misc]] |banners= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-centralnotice-banners|{{int:prefs-centralnotice-banners}}]] }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| → {{Preferences/section|{{{1}}}|{{{2}}}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| = {{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{uncheck|}}}| → {{nowrap|{{MediaWiki checkbox|no}} {{wrap|{{{uncheck}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{check|}}}| → {{nowrap|{{MediaWiki checkbox}} {{wrap|{{{check}}}}}}}|}}}}}} {{documentation}}

[[Special:Preferences|{{int:mypreferences}}]]{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}} |0 |user profile= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-personal|{{int:prefs-personal}}]] |1 |appearance= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|{{int:prefs-rendering}}]] |2 |date and time= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-datetime|Date and time]] |3 |editing= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-editing|{{int:prefs-editing}}]] |4 |recent changes= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rc|{{int:prefs-rc}}]] |5 |watchlist= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-watchlist|{{int:prefs-watchlist}}]] |6 |search= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-searchoptions|{{int:prefs-searchoptions}}]] |8 |pending changes= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-flaggedrevs|Pending changes]] |9 |gadgets= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-gadgets|{{int:prefs-gadgets}}]] |10 |notifications= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-echo|{{int:prefs-echo}}]] |11 |beta|beta features= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|{{int:prefs-betafeatures}}]] |7 |12 |misc= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-misc|Misc]] |banners= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-centralnotice-banners|{{int:prefs-centralnotice-banners}}]] }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| → {{Preferences/section|{{{1}}}|{{{2}}}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| = {{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{uncheck|}}}| → {{nowrap|{{MediaWiki checkbox|no}} {{wrap|{{{uncheck}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{check|}}}| → {{nowrap|{{MediaWiki checkbox}} {{wrap|{{{check}}}}}}}|}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
revision.text: [[Special:Preferences|{{int:mypreferences}}]]{{#switch: {{lc:{{{1|}}}}} |0 |user profile= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-personal|{{int:prefs-personal}}]] |1 |appearance= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|{{int:prefs-rendering}}]] |2 |date and time= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-datetime|Date and time]] |3 |editing= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-editing|{{int:prefs-editing}}]] |4 |recent changes= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rc|{{int:prefs-rc}}]] |5 |watchlist= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-watchlist|{{int:prefs-watchlist}}]] |6 |search= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-searchoptions|{{int:prefs-searchoptions}}]] |8 |pending changes= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-flaggedrevs|Pending changes]] |9 |gadgets= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-gadgets|{{int:prefs-gadgets}}]] |10 |notifications= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-echo|{{int:prefs-echo}}]] |11 |beta|beta features= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|{{int:prefs-betafeatures}}]] |7 |12 |misc= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-misc|Misc]] |banners= → [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-centralnotice-banners|{{int:prefs-centralnotice-banners}}]] }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| → {{Preferences/section|{{{1}}}|{{{2}}}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| = {{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{uncheck|}}}| → {{nowrap|{{MediaWiki checkbox|no}} {{wrap|{{{uncheck}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{check|}}}| → {{nowrap|{{MediaWiki checkbox}} {{wrap|{{{check}}}}}}}|}}}}}} {{documentation}}
